form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (22.77) at this track over 390m. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (22.63) at this track in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 2 for the first time. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (23.07) over 400m at Geelong. Has a solid record off the draw but looks safely held.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 390m at Shepparton beaten 5 lengths (22.99) behind Blues Train in a Grade 5 on April 16. Placed two back at Warragul. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won easily by 3.5 lengths at Bendigo (24.26) beating Smokin' Arrow in a Grade 5 on April 2. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Won her last three in a row including a narrow win last start racing on the pace over 390m at Warrnambool by a nose in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win. Solid chance with even luck.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 6 over 390m at this track behind Aunty Cheryl beaten 5 lengths (22.71) in a T3 RSTW. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.
